subject: An anime-style figure with long dark hair in casual clothing, seated or standing indoors in a contemplative, inward-looking pose
suspected_ip: Yachiyo Nanami (Magia Record: Puella Magi Madoka Magica Side Story)
description: The card art — viewed at medium resolution through the Weiss Schwarz card frame — depicts an anime-style character with long dark hair worn loosely down. The figure is in a casual or domestic setting, appearing to be indoors, and is positioned in a way that conveys reflection or quiet sadness. The posture is turned slightly away or downward, not engaging the viewer directly. Clothing appears to be casual layered garments in muted tones. The flavor text on the card reads 'We were friends once, but that was a long time ago', reinforcing the melancholic, reminiscing tone visible in the body language. At 400x558 resolution, facial expression detail is partially legible — the overall affect reads as wistful or sorrowful. The card title 'Reminiscing, Yachiyo' and the set (Magia Record) confirm the character's identity.
foreground: anime figure with long dark hair in casual muted clothing, contemplative posture
emotion: wistfulness and grief — the body turned inward, gaze downcast or averted, reflecting on lost friendship
